text.title: AI Code Review Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for the review-decision object the reviewer (human or agent) emits per PR. Must satisfy this before the merge-button is enabled.

field.name: checks
field.notes: exactly one entry per c01..c12, each with verdict + evidence_pointer

field.name: rationale
field.notes: required for any verdict other than APPROVE

field.name: senior_reviewer_required
field.notes: true if any of c06/c07/c08 fired

forbidden.pattern: verdict = APPROVE with any check entry marked BLOCK or REQUEST_CHANGES
verdict = APPROVE for a diff where ai_attestation is missing
check entry without evidence_pointer (line range OR file path OR commit SHA)
verdict = APPROVE when c06 (auth) fired without senior_reviewer co-signature
checklist trace generated by the same AI that generated the diff (reviewer must be a different model OR a human)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Collapse multiple check entries with the same evidence_pointer into a single bullet under each check that cites it.
Auto-fill ai_attestation from commit signature when the author has not filled it manually (mark as inferred).

list.item: All 12 checks have a verdict (no "n/a" without explicit justification)
Each check links to a concrete evidence pointer in the diff
Rationale paragraph present when verdict ≠ APPROVE
Reviewer is not the same model that generated the diff
